/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/Raz_ZP_qt.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/Raz_ZP_qt.dir/Raz_ZP_qt_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Raz_ZP_qt.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Raz_ZP_qt.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Raz_ZP_qt.dir/algorithmregistry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Raz_ZP_qt.dir/utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Raz_ZP_qt.dir/algorithms/marjino_kolomenkaya.cpp.o -o Raz_ZP_qt  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.8.3 QXlsx_build/libQXlsxQt6.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.8.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.8.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libxkbcommon.so
